mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, role, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, avatar = #{avatar}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
